hero.sub_strong: Remote tachograph download. Documents in one place. Live GPS.
hero.sub_rest: No more driving your fleet to the service center every 28 days. Groute does it in two clicks — wherever the truck is.

stats.fine_label: Fine for 1 missed tachograph download · BiH

pain.label: The Problem
pain.sub: Every fleet operator we talk to has at least two of these problems. Left unaddressed, they turn into fines, lost time, and accidents waiting to happen.

cards.c1_text: Drivers and vehicles must be at the service center simultaneously, every 28 days. Coordinator hell. Lost trips. Forgotten downloads.
cards.c2_text: Registration in email. Insurance in a drawer. Driver license photo on WhatsApp. Vehicle inspection report — nobody knows where. Until inspection day.
cards.c3_title: Fuel costs are a black box
cards.c3_text: No per-vehicle fuel data. No per-route cost breakdown. No way to catch the truck consuming 20% more than the rest of the fleet.
cards.c4_text: Dispatchers pick routes by habit, not data. No traffic, no tolls, no vehicle restrictions factored in. Unnecessary fuel burn on every trip.
cards.c5_text: No alerts for approaching service intervals. Breakdowns catch you off guard mid-route. Reactive maintenance instead of predictive.
cards.c6_text: Harsh braking, speeding, idling — no data until something breaks or someone gets hurt. HOS violations go undetected until the inspection.

steps.s1_text: We ask about your fleet, your current tachograph process, and where documents live. No pitch. We show only what's relevant for you.
steps.s2_text: We install devices on 2 of your vehicles. €100 refundable deposit per device. No subscription. No installation fee. You see real data from your actual fleet.
steps.s3_text: Our team comes to you. OBD-II plug-in for light vehicles (2 min). CAN bus hardwired for heavy trucks with tachograph integration (~3 hours/truck).
steps.s4_text: As soon as devices are installed, you see real-time location, fuel, and tachograph data. No waiting. No setup. Just open the browser.
steps.s5_text: After 30 days, we review the data together. If you see value — we expand to the full fleet. If not — full deposit refund, no questions asked.

timeline.title: Pilot Timeline
timeline.day0_desc: €100 deposit confirmed. Teltonika devices ordered. WhatsApp channel opened.
timeline.day12_desc: Vehicle profiles, users, alerts, geofences — all ready before devices arrive.
timeline.day34_desc: Our team at your depot. GPS signal verified. Tachograph connection confirmed.
timeline.day5_desc: System declared live. Training session complete. Data flowing in real time.
timeline.day7_desc: We review early data together. First insights. Any blockers resolved same day.
timeline.day30_desc: Full results presented. ROI calculated. Expand to full fleet or full refund — your call.

features.label: Platform
features.sub: Stop juggling 5 different tools. GPS, tachograph, documents, routes, diagnostics — all in one command center.

cards.remote_text: Download driver card and vehicle unit data remotely in two clicks — no matter where the truck is. Automated compliance checks against EU Regulation 561/2006. Alerts for approaching violations before they happen. Exportable reports for roadside inspections.
cards.docs_text: All registrations, driver licenses, insurance certificates, and inspection reports — in one searchable place. Automatic expiry alerts 30 days in advance. Role-based access.
cards.gps_text: Live location of every vehicle. Geofencing with automated alerts. Historical route playback. Status indicators: moving, idling, parked.
cards.fuel_text: Per-vehicle and per-route fuel consumption. Anomaly detection for fuel theft or leakage. Cost-per-kilometer calculations. Fleet benchmarking.
cards.route_text: AI-assisted route planning with traffic, tolls, vehicle type restrictions, and delivery windows. Real-time ETA updates for dispatchers.
cards.diag_text: Live HOS data tracking for every driver. Engine fault codes, oil pressure, battery voltage monitored continuously. Predictive maintenance alerts.

fines.label: Compliance
fines.sub: These are the real fines for tachograph violations across the Balkans. One missed download in BiH can cost more than a full year of Groute subscription for your entire fleet.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.sub: No hidden fees. No long-term lock-in. Month-to-month available. The product retains you — not the contract.
pricing.billing: per month · billed monthly · 10% off annually

pilot.title: Start with a free 30-day pilot
pilot.desc: We install devices on 2 of your vehicles. You pay a refundable deposit of €100 per device. No subscription. No installation fee. Full refund if you're not satisfied — no questions asked.

cta.label: Get Started
cta.sub: Book a 15-minute call. No pitch. We ask about your fleet and show you only what's relevant. If it makes sense — we'll have devices on your trucks within the week.
